response.original_title: Are You Going to Heaven?: This Video Will Reveal the Answer
response.overview: Are you going to heaven? How can anyone get to Heaven anyway?  Is Jesus the Only way?  Is Jesus God?  All important questions and popular searches on the Internet.  This classic video Are You Going to Heaven?  has been seen by millions of people over the years and shows why the bible is so fundamental to understanding Jesus, Christianity, heaven and hell, and what happens after you die.  Many people, when asked "what qualifies you for heaven?", say "I'll go to heaven because I'm a good person".  Is that really true?  The Heaven video makes it all very clear.
response.tagline: Warning: The Information Presented In This Video May Challenge Your Beliefs
response.title: Are You Going to Heaven?: This Video Will Reveal the Answer

results.name: Are You Going to Heaven?  This video answers that question.
